page: Microsoft Azure E48s_v6 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the Esv6 server family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 48 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 24 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8573C processor with an x86_64 architecture. The processor operates at a clock speed of 4.2 GHz and includes a 260 MB L3 cache. It is equipped with 384.0 GB of RAM, providing a 1:8 vCPU-to-memory ratio. This instance does not include local storage or GPUs, but it is Premium Storage capable.

Performance benchmarks indicate strong capabilities in memory-intensive and computational tasks. The server demonstrates strong performance in multi-threaded bzip3 decompression and single-threaded gzip compression. Geekbench testing places its image processing performance in the top tier, while ray tracing, text processing, and multi-core scores fall into the strong category. Large-block uncached memory read bandwidth is strong at 190.66 GB/sec, though Passmark memory scores are relatively weak. The hardware supports advanced instruction sets, including AVX-512 and Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX), which contribute to strong prompt processing speeds during LLM inference.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the E48s_v6 offers a high-density memory configuration relative to its compute resources, making it a viable option for memory-bound workloads without the overhead of higher vCPU tiers. It is well-suited for relational databases, in-memory caching systems like Redis, enterprise applications, and medium-scale LLM inference tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure E48s_v6 is a memory-optimized virtual machine powered by a 4.2 GHz Intel Xeon 8573C processor with 48 dedicated vCPUs and 24 physical cores. Built on the x86_64 architecture and running under Microsoft Hyper-V, it features 384.0 GB of RAM, yielding a 1:8 vCPU-to-memory ratio. While it lacks local storage and dedicated GPUs, it supports Premium Storage. Benchmarks reveal strong performance in large-block memory reads, multi-threaded decompression, and image processing, alongside strong prompt processing speeds for LLM inference enabled by Intel AMX. However, Passmark memory scores represent a relative bottleneck. This server is highly suited for memory-intensive workloads, including database operations, Redis caching, and enterprise application hosting.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E48s_v6 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 48 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 384 GB of RAM, and strong performance in database operations, image processing, and LLM inference.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E48s_v6 is a memory-optimized virtual machine with 48 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 384 GB of RAM, and strong database and processing performance.
tagline: A high-density memory-optimized virtual machine featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors for demanding database and memory-bound enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 48 dedicated vCPUs powered by a 4.2 GHz Intel Xeon 8573C processor
384.0 GB of RAM providing a high-density 1:8 vCPU-to-memory ratio
Intel AMX and AVX-512 support for accelerated vector and matrix operations
Strong performance in large-block memory reads and multi-threaded decompression
Optimized for relational databases, Redis caching, and enterprise applications
